content.text:
The cluster is running v24.1.0 with 3 nodes. I'll now perform a controlled rolling update to v24.1.1 by:
1. Setting partition=3 to pause the rollout
2. Updating the image
3. Incrementally decreasing the partition to upgrade one node at a time

input.description: Set partition=3 to stage the rolling update safely

input.command: kubectl -n cockroachdb set image sts/crdb-cluster cockroachdb=cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.1

content.text: Now I'll lower the partition to 2 to upgrade the first node (crdb-cluster-2), wait for it to be ready, then continue.

input.description: Lower partition to 2 to trigger upgrade of crdb-cluster-2
